component.name: Figmux
component.summary: Dedicated Linux desktop wrapper for Figma

description.p: Figmux opens Figma in an Electron-based Linux desktop window with a persistent browser partition so session data is retained across restarts.

ul.li: Fixed AppImage desktop integration so the dock icon resolves correctly after app-menu installation.
Added native AppImage update download notifications with progress milestones and a ready state.
Moved the in-app update toast to the first real download-progress event for more reliable display.
Added a tab context menu with a reload action for open Figma tabs.
Limited tab activation to primary-button clicks so right-click actions stay available.
Adjusted the + tab button to create a fresh tab directly.
